commit_message:
Barcock/example bug fixes Barcock/example bug fixes ### Summary

All known bugs addressed. Tested by cloning repository and following instructions. Only tested as far as ipbb vivado bitfile command because of licencing issue. I suggest not merging branches until I have verified the last two commands execute correctly.

Successfully built the example software for neo430 soft-core (both the FMC with E24AA025E4 and CryptoEEPROM on AX3).
